chapter_title.en: HADEETH ABOUT THE ONE WHO IS BORN IN AL-ISLAM

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 358)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 358)

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (عليه السلام) [عَنْ أَبِيهِ ع] أَنَّهُ

text: لِرَجُلٍ وَ قَدْ كَلَّمَهُ بِكَلَامٍ كَثِيرٍ فَقَالَ أَيُّهَا الرَّجُلُ تَحْتَقِرُ الْكَلَامَ وَ تَسْتَصْغِرُهُ اعْلَمْ أَنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لَمْ يَبْعَثْ رُسُلَهُ حَيْثُ بَعَثَهَا وَ مَعَهَا ذَهَبٌ وَ لَا فِضَّةٌ وَ لَكِنْ بَعَثَهَا بِالْكَلَامِ وَ إِنَّمَا عَرَّفَ اللَّهُ جَلَّ وَ عَزَّ نَفْسَهُ إِلَى خَلْقِهِ بِالْكَلَامِ وَ الدَّلَالَاتِ عَلَيْهِ وَ الْأَعْلَامِ.

en.hubeali: H 14576 – From him, from Haroun Bin Muslim, from Mas’ada, who has narrated the following:

Abu Abdullahasws, from hisasws fatherasws having said to a man who spoke to him by a lengthy speech, so heasws said: ‘O you man who belittles the speech, and considers knowledge to be insignificant, know that Allahazwj did not Send Hisazwj Rasoolas along with gold and silver, but Heazwj Sent himsaww by the speech. But rather, Allahazwj Majestic and Mighty Made Himselfazwj Recognised to the creatures by the speech, and the evidence (pointing) towards Himazwj, and the Signs’.
en.sarwar: 128. From him, from Haroun Bin Muslim, from Mas’ada, who has narrated the following: Abu Abdullah (a.s.), from his (a.s.) father (a.s.) having said to a man who spoke to him by a lengthy speech, so he (a.s.) said: ‘O you man who belittles the speech, and considers knowledge to be insignificant, know that Allah (azwj) did not Send His (azwj) Rasool (as) along with gold and silver, but He (azwj) Sent him (saww) by the speech. But rather, Allah (azwj) Majestic and Mighty Made Himself (azwj) Recognised to the creatures by the speech, and the evidence (pointing) towards Him (azwj), and the Signs’.
